subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy composition was perused, and it displayed the utmost eloquence and fluency of expression [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان منظومه آنجناب ملاحظه گردید و نهایت بلاغت و فصاحت در بیان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the power of words; of speech
